data.name: DiagnosticsFatalMessage
data.value: PrompterOne hit an unexpected error. Try the screen again or return to the library.

data.name: LibraryCreateFolderDescription
data.value: Organize scripts into nested collections without disturbing the library grid.

data.name: ImportScriptUnsupportedDetail
data.value: Choose a supported script or document file such as .tps, .md, .txt, .pdf, or .docx.

data.name: EditorDropUnsupportedDetail
data.value: Drop a .tps, .tps.md, .md.tps, .md, or .txt file onto the editor.

data.name: EditorLoadMessage
data.value: Unable to load the editor right now.

data.name: EditorPersistDraftMessage
data.value: Unable to save the current draft.

data.name: EditorSaveFileMessage
data.value: Unable to save this script to disk.

data.name: EditorSplitDraftMessage
data.value: Unable to split the current draft right now.

data.name: EditorSplitNoMatchesMessage
data.value: Add more section headings before splitting this draft.

data.name: EditorSyntaxMessage
data.value: The TPS draft has a syntax issue. Fix it and keep writing.

data.name: GoLiveHeroDescription
data.value: Arm destinations for the current program feed while leaving teleprompter and RSVP ready in separate tabs.

data.name: DiagnosticsConnectivityOfflineMessage
data.value: PrompterOne is offline. Live routing, cloud sync, and remote publishing will resume when the browser reconnects.

data.name: DiagnosticsConnectivityOnlineMessage
data.value: The browser connection is back. Continue working or reload if anything still looks stale.

data.name: SettingsCloudSectionDescription
data.value: Configure optional cloud snapshot targets here. Provider credentials stay in this browser local storage, and nothing is connected until you save valid real credentials.

data.name: SettingsFilesSectionDescription
data.value: PrompterOne is browser-only. Scripts stay in the browser library store, while recordings and exports use the browser-local storage container instead of fake desktop folders.

data.name: SettingsAiSectionDescription
data.value: Save AI provider profiles locally in this browser. PrompterOne stores these values as local configuration and does not validate remote credentials when you save.

data.name: SettingsRecordingSectionDescription
data.value: Configure how local recordings are saved during Go Live sessions.

data.name: SettingsStreamingSectionDescription
data.value: Configure browser-owned program capture, local recording, transport connections, and downstream targets here so Go Live stays focused on operating the session.

data.name: SettingsAppearanceSectionDescription
data.value: Customize the look and feel of the app and the teleprompter reader.

data.name: SettingsLanguageSectionDescription
data.value: Choose the language used across PrompterOne. The app reloads after you switch.

data.name: SettingsShortcutsSectionDescription
data.value: Review the current keyboard controls for the editor, Learn, Teleprompter, and Go Live surfaces.

data.name: TooltipRotateReaderOrientation
data.value: Rotate the reader between landscape and portrait

data.name: TooltipAlignTextLeft
data.value: Align text to the left edge

data.name: TooltipAlignTextCenter
data.value: Center text on the reading lane

data.name: TooltipAlignTextRight
data.value: Align text to the right edge

data.name: TooltipAlignTextJustify
data.value: Stretch text across the full readable width

data.name: RoutesNotFoundDescription
data.value: This route does not exist. Return to the library and choose another screen.

data.name: EditorMetadataHistoryHint
data.value: Recent browser-local revisions are kept here.

data.name: EditorMetadataSplitHint
data.value: Create separate scripts from headings in the current draft.

data.name: EditorSplitSavedToLibrary
data.value: New scripts were saved to the library.

data.name: EditorSplitSavedToSibling
data.value: New scripts were saved next to this script.

data.name: EditorSplitSavedToSiblingFolder
data.value: New scripts were saved next to this script in the same folder.

data.name: EditorSplitNeedTopLevelHeadings
data.value: Add # headings before splitting this draft.

data.name: EditorSplitNeedSegmentHeadings
data.value: Add ## headings before splitting this draft.

data.name: SettingsFilesScriptsDetail
data.value: Authoritative day-to-day script and folder persistence stays in browser storage, not on a desktop filesystem path.

data.name: SettingsFilesRecordingsDetail
data.value: PrompterOne provisions this browser-local container path for recording artifacts.

data.name: SettingsFilesExportsDetail
data.value: Exports are written to the browser-local container instead of a fake desktop Downloads folder.

data.name: SettingsCloudLocalFirstNote
data.value: Cloud sync stays optional. PrompterOne remains local-first until you connect a provider.

data.name: SettingsCloudGoogleDriveDescription
data.value: Store a Google Drive folder target and optional service-account sync settings for browser-triggered transfers.

data.name: SettingsCloudOneDriveDescription
data.value: Connect a OneDrive workspace for browser-local import and export workflows.

data.name: SettingsCloudDropboxDescription
data.value: Keep a Dropbox target ready for browser-local imports and exports.

data.name: SettingsCloudGoogleCloudStorageDescription
data.value: Configure a Google Cloud Storage bucket for browser-triggered archive transfers.

data.name: SettingsCloudCloudKitDescription
data.value: Configure a CloudKit container for browser-local snapshot sync.

data.name: SettingsCamerasSectionDescription
data.value: Choose which cameras are available in Go Live and select the primary stream camera.

data.name: SettingsCamerasNoDevicesVisible
data.value: No camera devices are currently visible to the browser.

data.name: SettingsCamerasAutoStartAllOnGoLive
data.value: Auto-start all enabled cameras on Go Live

data.name: SettingsMicrophonesSectionDescription
data.value: Choose which microphones are used in Go Live. Add audio delay to sync with video if needed.

data.name: SettingsMicrophonesNoDevicesVisible
data.value: No microphones are currently visible to the browser.

data.name: SettingsMicrophonesMuteWhenNotInGoLive
data.value: Mute all microphones when not in Go Live

data.name: SettingsStreamingBoundTransportConnectionsSummary
data.value: Select at least one transport connection for this target.

data.name: SettingsStreamingDestinationDisabledSummary
data.value: Disabled until you arm this destination.

data.name: SettingsStreamingDestinationNoSourceSummary
data.value: Select at least one scene camera for this destination.

data.name: SettingsStreamingSourcePickerEmptyStateMessage
data.value: No scene cameras are available for this destination yet.

data.name: SettingsStreamingUnsupportedTransportSummary
data.value: This target is bound only to transports that cannot provide a downstream relay path.

data.name: SettingsCameraPreviewDefaultDescription
data.value: Preview the selected camera exactly where device setup happens, before going live or opening Reader.

data.name: SettingsCameraPreviewNoCameraDescription
data.value: Pick a default camera or add one to the scene to see a live preview here.

data.name: SettingsCameraPreviewPermissionDescription
data.value: Enable camera access to confirm framing, mirror mode, and the active device before reading.

data.name: SettingsCameraPreviewReadyDescription
data.value: This preview follows the current default camera selection and mirror state.

data.name: SettingsMicrophoneMonitorDefaultDescription
data.value: Speak into the selected microphone to confirm the browser sees a live signal before recording or streaming.

data.name: SettingsMicrophoneMonitorNoMicrophoneDescription
data.value: Pick a default microphone to see a live level meter here.

data.name: SettingsMicrophoneMonitorPermissionDescription
data.value: Enable microphone access in Cameras first, then return here to confirm live input activity.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyEditorRedoDescription
data.value: Re-apply the last reverted editor change.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyEditorSelectAllDescription
data.value: Select the whole document in the source editor.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyLearnBackDescription
data.value: Leave Learn and return to the current script.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyTeleprompterBackDescription
data.value: Exit fullscreen when needed, then return to the script.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyTeleprompterPreviousBlockDescription
data.value: Jump to the previous reader block.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyTeleprompterNextBlockDescription
data.value: Jump to the next reader block.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyTeleprompterOrientationDescription
data.value: Toggle landscape and portrait reader orientation.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyTeleprompterAlignJustifyDescription
data.value: Stretch text across the full readable width.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyTeleprompterCameraDescription
data.value: Show or hide the reader camera layer.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyGoLiveDirectorModeDescription
data.value: Switch the studio to Director mode.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyGoLiveStudioModeDescription
data.value: Switch the studio to Studio mode.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyGoLiveLeftRailDescription
data.value: Show or hide the left source rail.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyGoLiveRightRailDescription
data.value: Show or hide the right preview rail.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyGoLiveFullProgramDescription
data.value: Expand or collapse the full-program monitor layout.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyGoLiveTakeToAirDescription
data.value: Switch the selected source to program.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyGoLiveRecordingDescription
data.value: Toggle local recording for the active program.

data.name: GoLiveLoadMessage
data.value: Unable to prepare live routing right now.

data.name: GoLiveSaveSceneMessage
data.value: Unable to save the current live scene.

data.name: GoLiveSaveStudioMessage
data.value: Unable to save live routing settings.

data.name: GoLiveSessionStartStreamMessage
data.value: Unable to start live outputs right now.

data.name: GoLiveSessionStopStreamMessage
data.value: Unable to stop live outputs right now.

data.name: GoLiveSessionStreamPrerequisiteDetail
data.value: No direct browser live output is armed. RTMP destinations still require an external relay.

data.name: GoLiveSessionStreamPrerequisiteMessage
data.value: Arm at least one direct browser publishing transport before starting the stream.

data.name: GoLiveSessionSwitchProgramMessage
data.value: Unable to switch the live program source right now.

data.name: GoLiveSessionStartRecordingMessage
data.value: Unable to start recording right now.

data.name: GoLiveSessionStopRecordingMessage
data.value: Unable to stop recording right now.

data.name: GoLiveSurfaceSingleLocalCameraPreviewHint
data.value: iPad browsers can preview one local camera at a time. Select a camera, then switch it live. Remote guest feeds can stay live.

data.name: GoLiveSurfaceSingleLocalCameraPreviewLimitDescription
data.value: This browser is previewing the selected local camera only. Use Switch to move the live feed.

data.name: GoLiveDestinationBlockedSummary
data.value: This target is bound only to transports that cannot deliver a downstream relay path.

data.name: GoLiveDestinationNoSourceSummary
data.value: No routed source is armed for this destination yet.

data.name: GoLiveDestinationTransportBindingSummary
data.value: Bind this target to at least one armed transport connection.

data.name: GoLiveSidebarRoomDescription
data.value: Invite remote guests to send their camera, mic, or screen. You control everything from here.

data.name: GoLiveSourcesEmptyStateMessage
data.value: No scene cameras are configured yet. Add them in Settings first.

data.name: SettingsAboutSectionDescription
data.value: PrompterOne is a professional teleprompter for creators, broadcasters, and public speakers.

data.name: SettingsAboutFooterText
data.value: Built and maintained by Managed Code.

data.name: SettingsAboutManagedCodeCardCopy
data.value: Everything in PrompterOne is designed, built, and maintained by Managed Code. Use the official links below for the company site, the public GitHub organization, and the live product site.

data.name: SettingsAboutManagedCodeCardSubtitle
data.value: Product, design, and engineering by Managed Code

data.name: SettingsStreamingLocalRecordingDescription
data.value: Arm local recording as a first-class sink of the same composed program feed used by the live transports.

data.name: OnboardingWelcomeBody
data.value: PrompterOne keeps one script moving from writing to rehearsal, live reading, and showtime without leaving the browser.

data.name: OnboardingWelcomeBulletSearch
data.value: Search scripts by title, file name, or the text inside the script.

data.name: OnboardingWelcomeBulletModes
data.value: One TPS script powers Editor, Learn, Teleprompter, and Go Live instead of separate copies.

data.name: OnboardingWelcomeBulletLocal
data.value: Your workspace stays local-first in this browser, with autosave, history, import, and export built in.

data.name: OnboardingTpsBody
data.value: TPS, short for TelePrompterScript, is the plain-text format PrompterOne uses to keep structure, pacing, pauses, and delivery cues in one readable source.

data.name: OnboardingTpsBulletFormat
data.value: TPS stays portable: you can version it, diff it, import it, and export it without locking your script into a proprietary project file.

data.name: OnboardingTpsBulletRuntime
data.value: PrompterOne runs that same TPS source through Editor, Learn, Teleprompter, and Go Live so authoring, rehearsal, and live playback stay aligned.

data.name: OnboardingTpsBulletGlossary
data.value: Terms like segment, block, effective WPM, archetype, compiler, and player come from the official TPS spec and glossary.

data.name: OnboardingEditorBody
data.value: The editor is where you draft, inspect, and refine the live TPS source with structure-aware tooling, parsed metadata, and authoring helpers tied to the same script.

data.name: OnboardingEditorBulletTps
data.value: Real-time TPS parsing highlights headings, tags, pauses, and authoring mistakes while you work.

data.name: OnboardingEditorBulletMetadata
data.value: Front matter, WPM, profile, version, and speed offsets stay attached to the draft instead of drifting into separate notes.

data.name: OnboardingEditorBulletAuthoring
data.value: Use search, menus, structure tools, local history, and AI helpers before moving the script into rehearsal or live reading.

data.name: OnboardingLearnBody
data.value: Learn uses RSVP, or Rapid Serial Visual Presentation, to show one word at a time in a focused rhythm so you can practice pacing, articulation, and retention.

data.name: OnboardingLearnBulletRsvp
data.value: RSVP keeps the active word centered while nearby context stays visible.

data.name: OnboardingLearnBulletTiming
data.value: Speed controls and TPS timing cues help you rehearse closer to the spoken cadence.

data.name: OnboardingLearnBulletContext
data.value: Use Learn for repetition, memory reinforcement, and pacing feedback before you go on camera.

data.name: OnboardingTeleprompterBody
data.value: The teleprompter turns the same TPS script into a live reading surface with focal guides, alignment, mirror controls, orientation changes, and live playback movement.

data.name: OnboardingTeleprompterBulletMirror
data.value: Mirror horizontally or vertically for reflective glass and tablet setups without leaving the reader route.

data.name: OnboardingTeleprompterBulletFocus
data.value: Tune width, focal point, text size, and alignment so the line stays calm and readable on camera.

data.name: OnboardingTeleprompterBulletPlayback
data.value: TPS pauses, speed shifts, emphasis, and delivery cues stay visible while you read.

data.name: OnboardingGoLiveTitle
data.value: Run the show in Go Live

data.name: OnboardingGoLiveBody
data.value: Go Live is the browser studio for the current script, program feed, sources, recording, and downstream transport state from one control surface.

data.name: OnboardingGoLiveBulletProgram
data.value: Keep one program feed in sync across preview, active source, and downstream destinations.

data.name: OnboardingGoLiveBulletRecording
data.value: Arm local recording and watch session state without pretending a server backend is doing the work.

data.name: OnboardingGoLiveBulletRouting
data.value: Use Go Live when you are ready to move from rehearsal into routing and capture.

data.name: OnboardingReopenBody
data.value: Use this when you want to revisit PrompterOne, TPS, RSVP, Editor, Learn, Teleprompter, and Go Live.

data.name: EditorSplitNeedSpeakerTags
data.value: Add Speaker:Name on ## or ### headings before splitting this draft.

data.name: SettingsAboutFeedbackCardSubtitle
data.value: Send notes straight to the PrompterOne team

data.name: SettingsAboutFeedbackCardCopy
data.value: Open a private Sentry-powered feedback form for bugs, rough edges, or ideas.

data.name: SettingsFeedbackUnavailableNote
data.value: Feedback sending is unavailable in this build because runtime telemetry is turned off.

data.name: FeedbackDialogGeneralBody
data.value: Tell us what is working, what is broken, or what would make PrompterOne better.

data.name: FeedbackDialogFatalBody
data.value: PrompterOne hit an unexpected error. Describe what you were doing and we will link your note to the captured crash.

data.name: FeedbackDialogMessagePlaceholder
data.value: What were you trying to do? What did you expect instead?

data.name: FeedbackDialogError
data.value: We could not send feedback right now. Try again in a moment.

data.name: FeedbackDialogMessageRequired
data.value: Add a short description before sending feedback.

data.name: AiSpotlightPlaceholder
data.value: Ask about this screen, selected text, or script graph

data.name: AiSpotlightIdleHint
data.value: Choose a suggestion or press Enter to ask the agent. PrompterOne will ask before changing text.

data.name: AiSpotlightSuggestionAskContextDetail
data.value: Use the current route, script context, and visible state.

data.name: AiSpotlightSuggestionRewriteSelectionDetail
data.value: Prepare an edit for the current editor selection only.

data.name: AiSpotlightSuggestionInspectGraphDetail
data.value: Check characters, themes, links, and graph status before answering.

data.name: AiSpotlightSuggestionOpenEditorDetail
data.value: Jump to the script editing workspace.

data.name: AiSpotlightSuggestionOpenLibraryDetail
data.value: Browse, search, import, or create scripts.

data.name: AiSpotlightSuggestionOpenSettingsDetail
data.value: Configure AI, microphones, shortcuts, and app behavior.

data.name: AiSpotlightAgentRunningDetailFormat
data.value: Running with route context, editor context, and {0} tools.

data.name: AiSpotlightAgentUnavailableDetail
data.value: Connect an AI provider in Settings, then run the request again.

data.name: SettingsHotkeyGlobalOpenAssistantDescription
data.value: Open or close the AI spotlight.

data.name: EditorGraphEmpty
data.value: No graph for this script yet.

data.name: EditorGraphSemanticUnavailableDetail
data.value: Connect an AI provider for writer-grade graph concepts, or run lower-fidelity tokenizer similarity.

data.name: EditorGraphSemanticFailedDetail
data.value: Check AI settings or run tokenizer similarity for a local fallback.

data.name: EditorGraphTokenizerActiveDetail
data.value: This view uses token overlap and distance, not LLM semantics.

data.name: EditorGraphSettingsDescription
data.value: Group the script by knowledge, structure, and delivery cues.

data.name: AiSpotlightApprovalRequiredBeforeChangingSelection
data.value: Approval required before changing selected text

data.name: AiSpotlightReviewEditBeforeApplying
data.value: Review the current and proposed text before applying this edit

data.name: AiSpotlightNoGraphBuilt
data.value: No script graph has been built yet

data.name: AiSpotlightNoActiveEditorTarget
data.value: There is no active editor target for this document edit.

data.name: AiSpotlightOpenEditorTryAgain
data.value: Open the source editor and try again.

data.name: AiSpotlightStructuredEditMissingExpectedText
data.value: The agent did not include expected source text for the range edit.

data.name: AiSpotlightStructuredEditRangeMismatch
data.value: The range edit was skipped because the expected source text did not match the current document.

data.name: LibraryLoadMessage
data.value: Unable to load the library right now.

data.name: LibraryCreateScriptMessage
data.value: Unable to create a new script.

data.name: LearnLoadMessage
data.value: Unable to load RSVP rehearsal right now.

data.name: TeleprompterAttachCameraMessage
data.value: Unable to enable the teleprompter camera.

data.name: SettingsLoadMessage
data.value: Unable to load settings right now.

data.name: SettingsRefreshMediaMessage
data.value: Unable to refresh camera and microphone access.

data.name: CloudStorageProviderInitializeMessage
data.value: Unable to initialize the selected provider.

data.name: CloudStorageUploadBackupMessage
data.value: Unable to upload the backup snapshot.

data.name: CloudStorageNoBackupSnapshotMessage
data.value: No backup snapshot was found for this provider.

data.name: CloudStorageInvalidBackupSnapshotMessage
data.value: The backup snapshot is empty or invalid.

data.name: CloudStorageOneDriveBrowserUnsupportedMessage
data.value: OneDrive client-secret storage is not supported in the browser runtime.

data.name: CloudStorageDropboxCredentialsRequiredMessage
data.value: Dropbox requires an access token or a refresh token with app key.

data.name: CloudStorageOneDriveCredentialsRequiredMessage
data.value: OneDrive requires tenant id, client id, and client secret.

data.name: CloudStorageServiceAccountJsonRequiredFormat
data.value: {0} requires a service account JSON key.

data.name: CloudStorageGoogleCloudStorageProfileRequiredMessage
data.value: Google Cloud Storage requires a project id and bucket name.

data.name: CloudStorageCloudKitCredentialsRequiredMessage
data.value: CloudKit requires an API token, web auth token, or server-to-server credentials.
